text:
/ci1 2 ああ、面白いのが出てきたな。
こいつは時折飛び出す赤い顔を
叩けばいいはずだ。

/ci1 2 それ以外の顔を叩くと……
まあ、そのうち怒るんじゃないか？

/ci1 2 Ah, now this is an amusing one. It's
dispatched easily enough--simply strike
the red face that occasionally reveals itself.

/ci1 2 If you strike the other faces, well...
It might get rather cross with you.

それ以外の顔を叩くと……
まあ、そのうち怒るんじゃないか？

Ah, now this is an amusing one. It's dispatched
easily enough--simply strike the red face that
occasionally reveals itself.

If you strike the other faces, well...
It might get rather cross with you.
